description:
After TASK-180 changes apply() to return Result, there may be call sites outside lifecycle_executor.rs that also need updating.

Search broadly for:
- `machine.apply(` across all crates
- `\.apply(WorkflowMachineEvent::` across all crates
- Any direct calls to `CompiledWorkflowMachine::apply` in tests

Known files to check:
- `crates/orchestrator-core/src/state_machine_parity.rs` — parity tests call apply()
- `crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow/tests.rs` — test helpers that call apply()
- Any other test files that construct state machines

Changes:
1. Search all `.rs` files for `apply(WorkflowMachineEvent::`
2. Update each call site: use `.expect()` in tests, proper error handling in production code
3. Verify: `cargo ao-bin-check` passes, `cargo test --workspace` passes

Depends on: TASK-180
title: Update remaining apply() call sites outside lifecycle_executor
